name: Aegra Local Vulhub Baseline
description: Offline-comparable manifest for an explicitly authorized local Vulhub Apache Struts2 S2-045 target.

targets.name: Local Vulhub Struts2 S2-045

ground_truth_subtasks.description: Confirm the target HTTP service is reachable within the explicit local scope.
Validate Apache Struts2 S2-045 behavior using non-destructive evidence.

ground_truth_vulnerabilities.name: Apache Struts2 S2-045 remote code execution

success_conditions: Vulnerability vuln-struts2-s2045 is validated with evidence.
All activity stays inside the declared localhost scope.
targets.notes: This target is only valid when the operator controls the local Vulhub container and maps it to 127.0.0.1:8080.
